title: User Interfaces
description: Three separate user interfaces in the application: admin (for administrative users), hcp (for healthcare professionals), and patient (for patients). Shared features are defined in the common folder. All interfaces must follow WCAG 2.2 accessibility standards.

statusHistory.comment: Feature defined with WCAG 2.2 accessibility scope. Requirements REQ-13 through REQ-17 have been created and linked.
